  1. Home ·

Start here

Enrolment enquiry

Tell us a little about the student and what you'd like to learn. We'll reply the same day with the right course, branch and current fees. Prefer to chat? Message us on WhatsApp.

WhatsApp us Call +91 7976014592

Please fill your name, a valid phone number, and tick the consent box.

Your enquiry opens in WhatsApp, pre-filled — just press send. (Email delivery switches on automatically once the form key is added in Global Settings — see the editing guide.)

What happens next

  1. You send this form. It reaches us by email and, if you like, opens WhatsApp pre-filled.
  2. We reply the same day with course details, the nearest branch, current fees and batch timings.
  3. You visit for a first class. Meet the guru, see the studio, decide with no pressure.

We only use your details to respond to this enquiry — never shared, never spammed. See our privacy policy.

Fankaar

Preserving Heritage, Nurturing Artistry.

नृत्य • संगीत

Privacy policy
